stories.headline: Iran warns US naval blockade threatens ceasefire
stories.summary: Iran says it will halt all trade in the Gulf if the US continues blocking its vessels.

stories.headline: 'Discussions are being had' on second round of Iran talks in Pakistan, White House says
stories.summary: Negotiators are focusing on three key points that derailed last weekend's talks, including Iran's nuclear programme, the Strait of Hormuz and compensation for wartime damages.

stories.headline: Countries pledge $1.5bn for Sudan crisis as war enters fourth year
stories.summary: UN chief calls for end to 'nightmare' war as Khartoum rejects international conference as 'colonial tutelage approach'.

stories.headline: U.S. sends thousands more troops to Mideast as Trump seeks to squeeze Iran
stories.summary: The infusion of firepower coincides with the administration’s maritime blockade against the regime in Tehran and as mediators urge both sides to extend their ceasefire.

stories.headline: US Senate rejects another war powers resolution to limit Trump on Iran
stories.summary: Fourth Senate War Powers vote - first since Trump threatened to destroy Iranian civilisation - fails to gain traction.

stories.headline: US sending 10,000 more troops to Middle East despite Iran ceasefire
stories.summary: The US is sending additional troops to the Middle East this month, according to The Washington Post.

stories.headline: Trump hints Iran talks could resume this week as US port blockade continues
stories.summary: The United Nations' secretary general said it was "highly probable" that the negotiations would restart.

stories.headline: Starmer says he's 'not going to yield' to pressure from Trump on Iran war
stories.summary: It follows a warning from the US president that America's trade deal with the UK "can always be changed".

stories.headline: US crude exports hit record as Iran war disrupts Middle East supplies
stories.summary: Foreign sales could push up US petrol prices and increase political pressure on Trump administration to curtail exports

stories.headline: Senate Republicans Again Block Bid to Limit Trump’s Iran War Powers
stories.summary: For the fourth time since the war began, G.O.P. senators successfully fended off an effort to constrain the president. But there were signs of growing unease among Republicans.

stories.headline: Senate rejects resolution to block Trump from striking Iran
stories.summary: The war powers resolution was the fourth to fail in the chamber since the war’s start — but some Republicans expressed fresh concern about the war as it approaches the two-month mark.

stories.headline: North Korea rapidly expanding nuclear weapons capability, UN watchdog warns
stories.summary: Pyongyang making ‘very serious’ progress on producing weapons, with rapid rise in activity at main nuclear complexNorth Korea has made “very serious” progress in its ability to produce more nuclear weapons, the head of the UN’s nuclear watchdog has said, in another sign that the regime is seeking to use its nuclear arsenal to ensure its survival.North Korea is thought to have assembled about 50 nuclear warheads, although some experts are sceptica

stories.headline: Pakistan army chief in Tehran to advance next round of US-Iran talks
stories.summary: Sources tell Al Jazeera that Pakistani mediators are hopeful about a breakthrough on Iran's nuclear programme.

stories.headline: Netanyahu sees Lebanon as his last chance for a ‘win’
stories.summary: After the failure in Gaza and Iran, the Israeli prime minister hopes he can be triumphant in Lebanon.

stories.headline: Trump threatens to fire Fed chair Powell if he doesn't leave in May
stories.summary: Donald Trump's threat marks the latest escalation in his ongoing spat with Jerome Powell.

stories.headline: Nine killed in second Turkish school shooting in two days
stories.summary: Eight students and one teacher died in the attack, according to Interior Minister Mustafa Cifci.

stories.headline: Magyar calls for fast handover of power in talks with Hungary's president
stories.summary: Péter Magyar, the man who ended Viktor Orbán's 16 years of continuous rule, wants the new parliament to convene in early May.

stories.headline: Kenya fuel prices rise sharply despite reduction in tax due to Iran war
stories.summary: Diesel prices rise by a record margin despite a reduction in value added tax.

stories.headline: Trump threatens to fire Jay Powell and refuses to halt criminal probe
stories.summary: US president insists Justice Department will not drop investigation into central bank chair

stories.headline: UK gas prices dip below pre-Iran war levels in boost for Reeves
stories.summary: Concerns about a full-blown supply crisis recede as Asia cuts consumption

stories.headline: Iran War Highlights Risks In The Chemical Supply Chain
stories.summary: John Roberts, Mizuho Managing Director joins to discuss the  supply chains in the global chemicals market continue to cause disruptions, a a volatile new cycle with cross-industry impact could be underway. Saying that everything in the synthetic world comes from the barrel of oil. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Flotilla carrying activists and aid for Palestinians in Gaza sets sail from Spain
stories.summary: Organisers of the Global Sumud Flotilla say that more than 70 boats and 1,000 people from around the world will participate.

stories.headline: Ukraine and Italy pledge to work together to boost defence and drone production
stories.summary: Zelenskyy is pressing European countries to join the PURL programme, launched last year, that allows Ukraine to receive US equipment financed by European countries.

stories.headline: 120,000 drones and more missiles: Allies double down on Ukraine aid in Berlin
stories.summary: Ukraine’s Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov emphasised that Kyiv is pushing to scale up domestic drone production and accelerate deliveries to the frontline.

stories.headline: Zelenskyy says Patriot missile shortage 'could not be any worse'
stories.summary: Ukraine’s shortage of Patriot missiles could not be worse than it already is, Volodymyr Zelenskyy said, as the US Vice President, JD Vance, called ending aid to Ukraine "one of the proudest" achievements of the Trump administration.

stories.headline: Trump threatens to fire Fed Chair Powell if he doesn’t step down by May 15
stories.summary: In a Fox Business interview, Trump says he will fire Powell if he does not vacate his board seat when his term ends.

stories.headline: Rate setters face ‘double danger’ from Iran war and tariffs, Fed official warns
stories.summary: Chicago Federal Reserve president Austan Goolsbee says public may ‘misinterpret’ price rises as persistent

stories.headline: Markets Are Too Blasé on War’s Economic Toll, Policymakers Warn
stories.summary: The International Monetary Fund and World Bank are historically beacons of free trade, capitalism and financial market wisdom. But at their spring meetings, the emerging theme has a contrarian vibe: Investors are underestimating the economic damage from the Iran war.

stories.headline: US Probes Suspicious Oil Trades Made Before Trump Pivots
stories.summary: The top US derivatives regulator is investigating a series of suspiciously well-timed trades in the oil futures market ahead of recent policy pivots by President Donald Trump related to the war in Iran, according to people familiar with the matter.

stories.headline: BOJ Urged to Keep Clear Message on Policy as War Clouds Outlook
stories.summary: Clear communication from the Bank of Japan will be even more important as uncertainty remains high amid ongoing Middle East tensions, the International Monetary Fund’s chief liaison for the country said two weeks before the central bank’s next monetary policy decision.

stories.headline: S&P 500, Nasdaq 100 Hit Records as Ceasefire Hopes Fuel Rally
stories.summary: Stocks extended their streak of gains, pushing both the S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 indexes to record highs, as investors piled into equities on optimism over the ceasefire between the US and Iran and robust corporate earnings.

stories.headline: JD Vance Heckled In Antiwar Protest at Turning Point USA Event
stories.summary: Vice President JD Vance appeared to express sympathy with critics of the war with Iran: “I recognize that young voters do not love the policy we have in the Middle East, OK. I understand.”

stories.headline: Swalwell’s Exit Injects ‘Chaos’ Into California Governor’s Race
stories.summary: Democratic candidates see sudden voter interest in the sleepy contest as a campaign opportunity. All are scrambling for support from former backers of Eric Swalwell.

stories.headline: Gallego Dismissed Rumors of a ‘Flirty’ Swalwell, Highlighting a Culture of Silence
stories.summary: The admission by Senator Ruben Gallego that he had heard, but disbelieved, rumors about Eric Swalwell and women showed the attitude on Capitol Hill toward men accused of behaving badly.

stories.headline: White House touts refunds, as most Americans say taxes are too high
stories.summary: The president hopes voters will focus on the benefit of “No Tax on Tips” and other breaks, but economists say higher gas prices will negate most of those benefits.

stories.headline: Trump says China has agreed not to send weapons to Iran
stories.summary: The president made the claim, which Beijing has yet to confirm, amid anger in China that its vessels could be caught up in a U.S. blockade targeting Iranian ports.

stories.summary: Residents south of the refinery in Corio warned to shelter inside due to smokeGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastGeelong refinery supplies 50% of Victoria’s fuel, and 10% of Australia’s in totalViva Energy’s refinery in Geelong supplies about 50% of Victoria’s fuel, and 10% of Australia’s in total, according to the company’s website.The refinery can process up to 120,000 barrels of oil per day, manufacturing petrol, diesel

stories.headline: Hungary’s Magyar urges president to quit, vows to overhaul state media
stories.summary: Incoming Prime Minister Peter Magyar says his government could be formed by mid-May.

stories.headline: Japan's Cybozu bets on Malaysia, Thailand for software growth, says CEO
Péter Magyar's landslide victory in Hungary - what's the impact on Brussels?
stories.summary: In this new edition of The Ring, broadcast from the European Parliament in Brussels, MEPs Daniel Freund (Greens) and Sander Smit (ECR) debate the outcome of the Hungarian election and what it means for Europe.

stories.headline: Panicked scenes after school shooting in Turkey leaves at least nine dead
stories.summary: A 14-year-old armed with five guns opened fire at a Turkish school on Wednesday, killing at least nine people, wounding 13 others, the interior minister said.

stories.headline: Hungary’s Péter Magyar says new government could take power at beginning of May
stories.summary: Magyar has called on Orbán's government to act as a caretaker in its final weeks and not to make any decisions that could threaten Hungary's interests or impede the incoming government's work.

stories.headline: Viktor Orbán to skip his last EU summit after bruising electoral defeat
stories.summary: The tradition in Brussels states that departing leaders are paid homage by their peers and given a goodbye token when they attend their last summit. Not for Orbán as he is now expected to skip the gathering.

stories.headline: Chinese national given one year in prison for smuggling ants out of Kenya
stories.summary: Zhang Kequn was arrested in March while trying to travel to China with more than 2,000 live ants.

stories.headline: Kanye West postpones France gig following UK ban
stories.summary: It comes a week after the UK government announced it would block the rapper from entering the country.

stories.headline: Watch: Vance heckled as he chides Pope
stories.summary: The US Vice-President was speaking at a Turning Point USA event, where he said Pope Leo should "be careful when he talks about matters of theology."

stories.headline: JPMorgan Raises $10 Billion From High-Grade Bond Sale
stories.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. raised $10 billion from an investment-grade bond sale, matching a separate deal on Wednesday from fellow Wall Street firm Morgan Stanley.

stories.headline: Madison Air Prices Biggest US Industrial IPO in Nearly 27 Years
stories.summary: Madison Air Solutions Corp. raised $2.23 billion in the biggest US listing of an industrial company in close to three decades.

stories.headline: Portal CEO on Lilly Deal for Cancer Biotech CrossBridge
stories.summary: Portal Innovations CEO John Flavin provides a look into the 2026 biotech M&A pipeline and breaks down Eli Lilly’s purported acquisition of CrossBridge Bio for up to $300 million, bolstering its oncology segment. He talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Colombia Buys Dollars Ahead of $4 Billion Bond Buyback Plan
stories.summary: Colombia’s government is buying up dollars this week as authorities gear up for an external debt buyback, pulling the peso back from a five-year high and triggering a jump in bonds.

stories.headline: Kroll CEO: Private Credit an Evolving, Maturing Market
stories.summary: Kroll CEO Jake Silverman discusses the rapid growth of the private credit market despite a period of ‘growing pains’ from participants trying to separate market reality from market perception. He talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Air New Zealand's economy Skynest bunk beds set for launch
stories.summary: Passengers can book a four-hour session in the bunk beds from May for Auckland-New York flights but airline cautions against smuggling in childrenEconomy passengers on Air New Zealand’s ultra-long-haul flight between Auckland and New York can book a spot in the airline’s bunk-bed style sleeping pods from May, which will take to skies in late 2026.In what the airline says is a world first, six full-length, lie-flat sleeping pods, are squeezed into

stories.headline: Victoria left without limits on political donations after high court rules laws unconstitutional
stories.summary: Scrapping a law which left a loophole for Labor and Coalition funding will expose the state to ‘dark money from foreign billionaires’, says premierFollow our Australia news live blog for latest updatesGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastThe high court has ruled Victoria’s political donation laws are unconstitutional, leaving the state with no limits on donations and no disclosure requirements unless new legislation is urgen

stories.headline: Analysis: Military purges prompted Xi Jinping to meet Taiwan KMT leader
Japan's big banks jostle to secure dollars with overseas corporate payments
Suzuki Motor, after India success, sets sights on 10% of African market
Tokyo DisneySea celebrates 25 years as foreigners increasingly fuel growth
Hamas rejects Gaza disarmament plan, Palestinian official says
stories.summary: The official tells the BBC that the armed group will not move forward with talks until Israel fully complies with its commitments.

stories.headline: Watch: What are Harry and Meghan doing in Australia?
stories.summary: BBC News journalist Simon Atkinson explains how the couple's tour will be different compared to their last visit.

stories.headline: What Swalwell’s exit means for Democrats in California’s governor race
stories.summary: Billionaire Tom Steyer and ex-congresswoman Katie Porter stand to benefit the most in a Democratic field with no clear front-runner, several strategists said.

stories.headline: Founder of China's Evergrande pleads guilty to fraud
stories.summary: Evergrande was once China's biggest real estate firm, with a stock market valuation of more than $50bn.

stories.headline: Harry and Meghan mix charity and business on Australia visit
stories.summary: There are questions over whether local taxpayers are picking up any of the bill for policing the visit.

stories.headline: Bongbong Marcos fights ill-health rumours with star jumps
stories.summary: The Philippine President challenged anyone questioning his fitness to join him in the gym.

stories.headline: Israel steps up strikes on Lebanon and Hezbollah attacks continue as talks loom
stories.summary: More than 160 people have been killed since Friday in Lebanon, where Israel is pressing on with its campaign against Hezbollah despite the US-Iran ceasefire.

stories.headline: Orbán era swept away by Péter Magyar's Hungary election landslide
stories.summary: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule is over, defeated by a 45-year-old ex-party insider who convinced a majority of Hungarians to oust him.

stories.headline: Italian PM condemns ally Trump over 'unacceptable' Pope criticism
stories.summary: Italy's prime minister and the US president are close allies, but Trump has refused to apologise to the "very weak" Pope Leo XIV.

stories.headline: Philippines accuses Chinese fishermen of dumping cyanide in South China Sea
stories.summary: Beijing rejects the allegation as a "farce", while Manila claims the poison was used to kill fish and deprive troops stationed in the area of food.

stories.headline: Peru election drags into second day after ballot delivery fiasco
stories.summary: Technical and logistical problems mean Peruvians choosing a new president and members of Congress continue to vote on Monday.

stories.headline: Ukraine and Russia accuse each other of hundreds of ceasefire violations
stories.summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky says his nation's forces would respond "symmetrically" to Russian attacks.

stories.headline: How the cost of holidays, food and clothes is rising - despite the Iran ceasefire
stories.summary: Fuel costs have already soared, flights and mortgages are also rising - and food could soon do the same.

stories.headline: How war has made a 33-year-old the Czech Republic’s richest man
stories.summary: The rapid rise of CSG, Europe’s newest defence giant

stories.headline: Argentina passes bill loosening protection of its glaciers
stories.summary: The new bill will make it easier for provincial governments to allow mining projects in glacier regions.
